text.title: Multi-Burn-Rate SLO Recipe Failure Modes
text.summary: 3 antipatterns observed when multi-burn-rate-slo-recipe is applied incorrectly. Each entry has a symptom (`description`), a root cause (`reason`), and a corrective fix (in `note`).

antipattern.description: Burn-rate alert pages every 4 hours regardless of actual burn.
antipattern.reason: Threshold too low; no dry-run tuning.
antipattern.note: Fix: Dry run; re-tune; consider raising long-window threshold.

antipattern.description: On-call has no runbook for the burn-rate alert.
antipattern.note: Fix: CI block: alert PRs without runbook_url cannot merge.

antipattern.description: Slow burn unnoticed because only short-window alert exists.
antipattern.reason: Single-window recipe; long-burn pattern missed entirely.
antipattern.note: Fix: Add long-window companion alert per recipe.
